cadence_note: OHSS publishes the Yearbook of Immigration Statistics annually, roughly 18 months after the fiscal year closes (the FY2024 tables were released 2026-06). This connector is pinned to the FY2024 edition, whose tables are closed and do not advance; the yearly re-run exists to detect the workbook URLs moving or the edition being withdrawn, not to pick up new rows. A new fiscal year ships as a new edition with its own sheet set and needs a fresh collect.
